scenario: End of session or focus sprint.
script_for_bot: How focused did you feel (1–5)? What helped the most—short timer, clear steps, calm tone, or environment? Note your answer—I'll remind you next time what worked.
rationale: Metacognitive reflection reinforces self-awareness and builds self-regulated learning habits.
source: Zimmerman, B. (2002). Becoming a Self-Regulated Learner; UNESCO Inclusive Learning Framework (2021)
